docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,885.00 FILED BY CAROLLO, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT BATEH, LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAROLLO, GLENN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. COURT DISCLOSURE IS GIVEN. PLAINTIFF GLENN CAROLLO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LOUIS BATEH, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. PARTIES REACH A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $620.00. DEFENDANT PAYS PLAINTIFF THE AGREED TO AMOUNT BY CHECK IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JUN-16-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BATEH, LOUIS
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
